title: The bond market is flashing a clear signal on interest rates. Bitcoin bulls should take note
summary: The bond market is sending a signal that complicates prospects of a near-term bitcoin bull run.

title: Live markets: Bitcoin, ether ETFs lose $111 million combined as rate-cut hopes die
summary: Total crypto market value has held steady near $2.26 trillion since Tuesday, with the recovery losing momentum after the Fed killed rate-cut hopes and spot ETFs swung back to outflows.

title: Strategy's STRC preferred stock hits a record low below par
summary: The slide has paused the above-par share sales Strategy uses to fund bitcoin purchases, and it is the same stock whose dividends forced the company's first BTC sale this month.

title: XRP slips 4% below $1.20 after breakout rally stalls near key resistance
summary: Heavy selling pushed XRP back through a closely watched support level, though buyers stepped in above $1.17 to prevent a deeper pullback.

title: Buying bitcoin below its 200-week average has historically delivered over 100% in median returns, Kraken says
summary: Bitcoin briefly slipped below its 200-week moving average twice in the past two weeks, a rare event that Kraken says has historically marked strong entry points for buyers.
